title: dryopteris atrata var. stenolepis
intro: Dryopteris atrata var. stenolepis, also known as the black wood fern, is a type of fern species that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of black wood fern include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Dryopteris atrata var. stenolepis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
